## Micron announces plans to invest up to $3B in US semiconductor ecosystem

A commitment of this scale signals Micron's forward cycle conviction and domestic capex intent; reinforces the semiconductor_cycle expansion thesis and positions MU favorably relative to CHIPS Act-adjacent tailwinds.

- Micron committed to investing up to $3B in the US semiconductor ecosystem.
- Scale and domestic focus signal confidence in the memory/semiconductor cycle outlook.
- Aligns with the broader US semiconductor onshoring trend.
- No specific project, facility, or timeline details were disclosed in the headline.
